1200001157.english: The sound of Brigadier General Lumberjane being promoted to Major General.

1200001159.english: Why are you saying such terrible things?
1200001159.korean: 무슨 그런 끔찍한 소리를 하고 그래!

1200001161.english: Huh? Sowan Big Sis, what's wrong?

1200001162.english: Didn't you say the results of the fish investigation we entrusted last time were out?
1200001162.korean: 지난 번에 맡긴 생선 조사 결과가 나왔다고 하지 않았사옵니까?

1200001163.english: I'm so busy with kitchen work that I've only just been able to come now.

1200001165.english: Sorry, I'm really busy right now too.

1200001167.english: This isn't some kind of mutation.

1200001170.english: Are you talking about the Alterium?

1200001172.english: The fish protein has combined with the Alterium.

1200001174.english: They wouldn't have combined if it wasn't possible, right? However, I haven't fully grasped the properties of Alterium yet, so I can't explain it in detail.
1200001174.korean: 가능하니까 결합했겠지? 하지만 나도 아직 알터리움의 성질에 대해서 전부 파악하고 있는 것은 아니라서 자세히 설명은 못 하겠어.

1200001175.english: However, it's not impossible for metals and proteins to bind.
1200001175.korean: 하지만 금속과 단백질이 결합하는 건 불가능한 일이 아니야.

1200001176.english: The closest example is the hemoglobin in red blood cells, which is also a metalloprotein formed by the combination of iron and protein.
1200001176.korean: 가장 가까운 예시로 적혈구의 헤모글로빈도 철분과 단백질이 결합된 금속단백질이야.

1200001177.english: Not all the fish Sowan Big Sis received were like this, right?
1200001177.korean: 소완 언니가 받은 생선 전부가 이런 건 아니었지?

1200001179.english: Then it's highly likely those fish moved downstream or upstream...
1200001179.korean: 그러면 그 생선들이 하류 혹은 상류에서 이동했을 확률이 높은데…

1200001180.english: Didn't you say T-40 Hyena-Big Sis caught this? Could you ask where they caught it?
1200001180.korean: 이거 하이에나 언니가 잡은 거라고 했지? 어디서 잡았는지 물어봐 줄 수 있어?

1200001181.english: Right now, I'm working on a lot of things, not just this fish...
1200001181.korean: 지금 이 생선뿐만 아니라 이것저것 하고 있는 작업이 많아서…

1200001182.english: Thank you for your hard work. Of course I'll help you.

1200001185.english: Have you discovered why Atalanta-san's cooking always results in strange outcomes?
1200001185.korean: 아탈란테 양이 요리를 하면 이상한 결과물이 나오는 이유를 알아내셨사옵니까?

1200001187.english: My pride as a scientist has been hurt.

1200001190.english: I'm busy right now and can't do a proper verification, but...
1200001190.korean: 지금 바빠서 제대로 된 검증을 못하고 있지만…

1200001191.english: When I have more time later, I'll thoroughly investigate the cause and effect.
1200001191.korean: 나중에 여유가 생기면 철저하게 인과관계를 밝히겠어.

1200001192.english: I swear on my brother's name!

1200001194.english: If I hear from the T-40 Hyena where he caught the fish, I will immediately send a message to the panel.
1200001194.korean: 하이에나에게 생선을 어디서 잡아왔는지 대답을 들으면 곧장 패널로 메시지를 보내겠사옵니다.

1200001199.english: The fish Sister Sowan brought, the deer Sister Titania brought, the mysterious message CoCo & WhiteShell delivered, and the movement of Iron Bugs happening everyplace.
1200001199.korean: 소완 언니가 가져온 생선, 티타니아 언니가 가져온 사슴, 코코가 전해준 의문의 메시지, 그리고 곳곳에서 일어나고 있는 철충의 이동.

1200001200.english: Something is definitely happening right now...
1200001200.korean: 지금 무슨 일이 일어나고 있는 건 분명한데…

1200001202.english: If you give the wrong answer, you might react inappropriately and miss the golden hour.
1200001202.korean: 틀린 답을 내버리면 엉뚱한 대응을 한다고 골든 타임을 놓칠 수 있어.

1200001203.english: You shouldn't create anxiety by producing incorrect results.
1200001203.korean: 잘못된 결과를 도출해서 불안감을 조성해서도 안 되죠.

1200001204.english: I can't tell if what's happening within Orca's sphere of influence right now is happening only here or worldwide.
1200001204.korean: 지금 오르카의 세력권 내에서 일어나고 있는 일이 이곳 한정으로 일어나고 있는지 아니면 전 세계에서 일어나는지 알 수가 없어요.

1200001205.english: For now... it seems like there's no particular movement in South America...
1200001205.korean: 일단… 남미는 특별한 움직임이 없는 거 같은데…

1200001206.english: It's critical that the Iron Worms destroyed all the infrastructure before we could get to the Svalbard archipelago. If other infrastructure had remained, we could have obtained more information from around the world...
1200001206.korean: 스발바르 제도로 가기 전에 철충들이 인프라를 전부 박살낸 것이 치명적이네요. 만약 다른 인프라가 남아 있었으면 세계 곳곳의 정보도 더 입수할 수 있었을 텐데…

1200001207.english: The invisible range and radio interference range of Ironworm are too wide.
1200001207.korean: 철충의 불가시 영역과 전파 방해 범위가 너무 넓어요.

1200001208.english: Several reconnaissance units are currently entering Ironworm Territory directly to investigate, but no information has come in that can be linked to the phenomenon currently occurring.
1200001208.korean: 지금 몇몇 정찰부대가 직접 철충의 영역으로 들어가서 살펴보고 있지만 지금 일어나고 있는 현상과 연관시킬 수 있는 정보가 들어오고 있지는 않아요.

1200001209.english: Orca has a vast territory to protect, but a limited number of troops to move.
1200001209.korean: 오르카가 지켜야 하는 땅은 넓고, 움직일 수 있는 병력은 한정되어 있죠.

1200001210.english: Even if we could just pinpoint the epicenter where this is happening...
1200001210.korean: 하다못해 이 일이 일어나고 있는 중심지를 특정할 수만 있다면…

1200001211.english: I ran the program, but there are still too many unknowns.
1200001211.korean: 프로그램을 돌렸는데 아직 미지수가 너무 많아.

1200001213.english: I got some information from Sowan. Where did the T-40 Hyena sister catch the fish?
1200001213.korean: 소완 언니한테 정보가 들어왔어. 하이에나 언니가 어디서 물고기를 잡았는지.

1200001214.english: After tracing the tributaries upstream to find the source of the river, and then combining the location information of all the places where anomalies have occurred so far...
1200001214.korean: 지류를 거슬러 올라 강의 원류를 찾은 후에 지금까지 이상현상이 있었던 곳의 위치정보를 조합하면…

1200001215.english: ...Sis. I've narrowed down the scope a lot. Once more information comes in, we'll be able to pinpoint the location.
1200001215.korean: ……언니. 범위는 많이 좁혔어. 다른 정보가 더 들어오면 위치를 확정지을 수 있을거야.

1200001216.english: Right now, it feels like I'm handling a ticking time bomb that I can't even see.
1200001216.korean: 지금 타이머가 보이지 않는 시한 폭탄을 다루고 있는 기분이네요.

1200001217.english: Will we defuse the bomb first, or will it explode first?
1200001217.korean: 우리가 폭탄을 해체하는 것이 먼저일지, 폭탄이 터지는 게 먼저일지.

1200001218.english: Have you finished decoding the message CoCo & WhiteShell sent?

1200001219.english: It looks like it's going to take a little longer.
1200001219.korean: 시간이 조금 더 걸릴 거 같아.

1200001222.english: 10 hours? Can't it be any faster than that?

1200001225.english: It's good that you don't lose your sense of humor even in situations like this, but if you were a bit more serious, it would be perfect.
1200001225.korean: ……이런 상황에서도 유머러스함을 잃지 않는 것도 좋지만 좀 더 진중하면 바랄 게 없겠네요.

1200001227.english: Then, let's see what the message is.

1200001229.english: Citizens, gather at our nest. Citizens, gather at our nest. People, gather at our nest.
1200001229.korean: 신민들이여, 우리의 둥지로 모이거라. 신민들이여, 우리의 둥지로 모이거라. 신민들이여, 우리의 둥지로 모이거라.

1200001232.english: I think I've heard something similar before...
1200001232.korean: 옛날에 비슷한 것을 들어본 거 같은데…

1200001234.english: If my sister doesn't remember, that means it was before she joined...
1200001234.korean: 언니가 기억을 못한다면 언니가 합류하기 전이라는 건데…

1200001237.english: Sister, I'm sorry. I can't tell you. Because if I say something carelessly, my sister might get prejudiced against me.
1200001237.korean: 언니, 미안. 알려줄 수는 없어. 함부로 말했다가는 언니한테 선입견이 생길 수 있으니까.

1200001238.english: But... if I'm right about what I'm thinking... something very dangerous is going to happen.
1200001238.korean: 하지만… 내가 생각한 게 맞다면… 무척 위험한 일이 생길 거야.

1200001239.english: - While our technical team was diligently inspecting, analyzing, reverse-engineering, and maintaining the Haka… Dragon’s Nest, Fafnir proceeded with negotiations regarding the maintenance fees.
1200001239.korean: - 우리 기술진들이 열심히 하카… 용의 둥지를 살펴보고, 분석하고, 역설계하고, 정비하는 동안에 파프니르는 정비료에 대한 협상을 진행했다.

1200001241.english: How much are you thinking of a budget?

1200001243.english: On what grounds did you think we would maintain your airship for free? And your chief engineer said she would pay.
1200001243.korean: 무슨 근거로 우리가 공짜로 너희 비행선을 정비해줄 거라고 생각한 거야? 그리고 너희 기관장이 지불한다고 말했잖아.

1200001245.english: Canned tuna. If you don't have any, take gold.

1200001247.english: Are you pretending to be innocent? Or do you really not know?
1200001247.korean: 순진한 척 하는 거야? 아니면 정말로 모르는 거야?

1200001249.english: What? Why is it so expensive!?

1200001250.english: Because it is not an era where gold is as valuable as it used to be.
1200001250.korean: 금이 옛날처럼 가치 있는 시대는 아니니까.

1200001251.english: And because our Orca technical team has the best skills in the world.
1200001251.korean: 그리고 우리 오르카 기술진들은 세계 최고의 실력을 가지고 있으니까.

1200001252.english: They are highly reliable and don't pull any weird stunts.
1200001252.korean: 신뢰도도 높고 이상한 수작질도 안 하지.

1200001253.english: If you are dissatisfied, ask them to fix it somewhere else.

1200001254.english: PECS likely possesses sufficient technical capabilities, but...

1200001255.english: If I were Lemonade, I don't think I would just leave a giant airship like that alone.
1200001255.korean: 내가 레모네이드라면 저런 거대 비행선을 그냥 두지는 않을 거 같은데?

1200001258.english: - Having nothing to do while the airship was being repaired, Fafnir and her crew enjoyed life in Orca.
1200001258.korean: - 비행선을 정비하는 동안 할 일이 없어진 파프니르 일당은 오르카의 생활을 만끽했다.

1200001259.english: I wonder how long it has been since I took a bath in such a big bathhouse...
1200001259.korean: 이렇게 큰 목욕탕에서 목욕한 것이 얼마만인지…

1200001260.english: Isn't this the first time since we were created? I don't really remember taking a proper bath even before the apocalypse.
1200001260.korean: 우리가 만들어지고 처음 아냐? 멸망 전에도 딱히 제대로 된 목욕탕에서 목욕했던 기억이 없는데?

1200001261.english: Is that so? Come to think of it, it seems so.

1200001262.english: Captain! So let's build a bathhouse on our airship too! A huge one! It feels sticky just taking a shower!
1200001262.korean: 대장! 그러니 우리도 우리 비행선에 목욕탕 만들자! 엄청 큰 걸로! 샤워만 하면 찝찝하다고!

1200001263.english: They're doing maintenance right now, you know. Let's ask them to make it for us while they're at it!
1200001263.korean: 마침 지금 정비하고 있잖아. 정비하는 김에 만들어달라고 하자!

1200001264.english: Hey! I paid for the maintenance right now with my treasure, too!
1200001264.korean: 야! 지금 정비하는 것도 내 보물로 지불했거든!

1200001265.english: Ow! We were there when you were collecting that treasure, too!
1200001265.korean: 우우! 그 보물 모을 때 우리도 있었잖아!

1200001266.english: Come to think of it, don't we have the right to receive dividends too?
1200001266.korean: 생각해보니 우리도 배당금 받을 권리가 있는 거 아냐?

1200001269.english: I saved their life, fed them, sheltered them, and protected them…

1200001270.english: If you look at it that way, we did all sorts of things following the commander's orders, too!
1200001270.korean: 그렇게 따지면 우리도 대장 명령 따라서 이런저런 일 많이 했다고!

1200001273.english: - Fafnir also commissioned us to build a bathhouse in the dragon's nest.
1200001273.korean: - 파프니르는 우리에게 용의 둥지에 목욕탕 건설도 의뢰했다.

1200001276.english: On an airship? It’s not impossible.

1200001277.english: It goes without saying, but it's not free?

1200001279.english: I'm not an expert, but I think it would roughly come out like this.
1200001279.korean: 내가 전문가는 아니지만 대충 이 정도는 나오지 않을까?

1200001280.english: It's expensive! Why is it so pricey just to add a bathhouse?
1200001280.korean: 비싸잖아! 고작 목욕탕 하나 추가하는데 왜 이리 비싸?

1200001281.english: Do you think building a bathhouse is just a one-time thing? It’s not simply about creating the space itself; it also involves tasks like installing equipment such as pumps and boilers, reinforcing work to support the load, and calculating weight balance.
1200001281.korean: 목욕탕이 그냥 만들면 끝인 줄 알아? 단순히 목욕탕이라는 공간만 만드는 게 아니라 그에 따른 펌프나 보일러 같은 설비, 하중을 버티기 위한 보강공사, 무게 밸런스 계산 같은 일도 따라오잖아.

1200001284.english: Captain! Let's build an arcade on the airship too!

1200001286.english: There's nothing but old games! I want to play new games!
1200001286.korean: 전부 오래된 게임 밖에 없잖아! 새로운 게임도 하고 싶다고!

1200001287.english: The captain might be satisfied just looking at the treasure, but we like the game better than the treasure!
1200001287.korean: 대장은 보물만 봐도 만족스럽겠지만 우리는 보물보다 게임이 더 좋다고!

1200001288.english: No! Playing too many games makes you stupid!
1200001288.korean: 안돼! 게임 많이 하면 머리 나빠져!

1200001289.english: Oh? Is this based on your own experience?

1200001290.english: So, is that why you don't play games so your brain doesn't get worse?
1200001290.korean: 그래서 더 머리 안 나빠지려고 게임을 안 하시는 건가요?

1200001291.english: Why are you guys doing this to me…

1200001292.english: I said build a new arcade!

1200001295.english: - Fafnir also commissioned us to build an entertainment room in the dragon's nest.
1200001295.korean: - 파프니르는 우리에게 용의 둥지에 오락실 건설도 의뢰했다.

1200001300.english: Hmm... at this level, I guess they'll just install a few games on the panel and hand it over.
1200001300.korean: 흠… 이 정도면 패널에 게임 몇 개 깔아서 넘겨주는 걸로 끝이겠는데?

1200001301.english: What? Why is the game so expensive!?

1200001302.english: In times like these, would there be many places creating new forms of entertainment?
1200001302.korean: 이런 시대에 새로운 오락거리를 만드는 곳이 흔하겠어?

1200001303.english: You're saying there's no place in the world that makes entertainment of the same quality as Orca?
1200001303.korean: 세계 어디를 둘러봐도 오르카만큼 양질의 오락거리를 만드는 곳은 없다고?

1200001304.english: It would be better to bring a machine from an old-school arcade!
1200001304.korean: 옛 시대의 오락실에서 기계 가져오는 게 더 낫겠다!

1200001305.english: So be it. The choice is yours.

1200001306.english: But I think only Orca can provide proper network configuration, periodic updates, and verified new releases.
1200001306.korean: 하지만 제대로 된 네트워크 구성과 주기적인 업데이트, 검증된 신작은 오르카에서만 제공할 수 있을 걸?

1200001307.english: Will the four subordinates who enjoyed our Orca's game be satisfied with other games?
1200001307.korean: 우리 오르카의 게임을 즐긴 네 부하들이 다른 게임들로 만족할 수 있을까?

1200001312.english: How would you like to calculate this?

1200001313.english: Let's attach this to our leader!

1200001315.english: How would you like to calculate this?

1200001316.english: Please get it from our boss!

1200001317.english: New tool sets, rare parts reservations, latest maps and flight route information…
1200001317.korean: 신형공구세트, 희소 부품 예매, 최신 지도 및 항공로 정보…

1200001318.english: How would you like to calculate this?

1200001320.english: Hey! I didn't say I'd buy it for you!
1200001320.korean: 야! 난 사준다는 말 안 했어!

1200001321.english: I'm leaving the rear to you, Captain.

1200001323.english: You never usually use 'nim' (a respectful honorific), but you're using it now!?
1200001323.korean: 평소에는 님 자 절대로 안 붙였으면서 이럴 때 붙이기야!?

1200001324.english: Lord Fafnir? Where are you going?

1200001325.english: I don't know anything about that.

1200001326.english: Lord Fafnir? Right here. You can see that the Orca Branch of the Saman Supplies Office is completely empty, right?
1200001326.korean: 파프니르 님? 지금 이곳. 삼안 물자 영업소 오르카 지부가 텅텅 비어있는 게 보이시죠?

1200001328.english: … … Please ignore that because it is dead stock.

1200001329.english: Getting back to the main point… Lord Fafnir’s subordinates have purchased all the goods from the Orca Branch of the Saman Supplies Sales Office.
1200001329.korean: 다시 본론으로 돌아와서… 파프니르 님의 부하분들께서 삼안 물자 영업소 오르카 지부의 상품들을 전부 구매하셨답니다.

1200001330.english: And the last person ordered additional supplies and information that are not available here.
1200001330.korean: 그리고 마지막 분은 이곳에 없는 물자와 정보를 추가로 주문하셨고요.

1200001331.english: I... I'm telling you, I don't know anything about it!

1200001332.english: Lord Fafnir? The Saman Supplies Office absolutely never does business at a loss, you know?
1200001332.korean: 파프니르 님? 삼안 물자 영업소는 손해 보는 장사는 절대로 안 한답니다?

1200001333.english: Even to the Commander, the last human, we won't provide the product unless payment is received.
1200001333.korean: 마지막 인간님이신 사령관님께도 대금을 받지 않으면 상품을 제공하지 않죠.

1200001334.english: Lord Fafnir? The Saman Supplies Office provided goods to your subordinates because they assumed you would pay for them?
1200001334.korean: 파프니르 님? 삼안 물자 영업소는 파프니르 님께서 상품에 대한 대금을 지불하실 거라 생각하였기에 파프니르 님의 부하분들께 상품을 제공했답니다?

1200001335.english: But are you refusing to pay?

1200001337.english: Saman Materials Sales Office says they absolutely never do business at a loss.
1200001337.korean: 삼안 물자 영업소는 손해 보는 장사는 절.대.로. 안 한답니다?

1200001339.english: - The gold trading price at Saman Materials Sales Office has dropped slightly.
1200001339.korean: - 삼안 물자 영업소의 금 매매 가격이 조금 하락했다.

1200001341.english: If you don't make it for me, I'll switch to Orca?

1200001342.english: So now you guys are just asking me to make whatever I want...
1200001342.korean: 너희들 이제는 그냥 막 만들어달라고 하는구나…

1200001343.english: - Fafnir also commissioned us to build a movie theater in the dragon's nest.
1200001343.korean: - 파프니르는 우리에게 용의 둥지에 영화관 건설도 의뢰했다.

1200001344.english: I'm not exactly a sociable person, nor do I laugh a lot...
1200001344.korean: 내가 붙임성 있는 성격도 아니고, 웃음이 많은 것도 아닌데…

1200001345.english: Just looking at you makes me smile.

1200001349.english: So, what are you planning to commission this time?

1200001353.english: - I have received reports about the strange phenomena occurring in Europe.
1200001353.korean: - 나는 유럽에서 일어나고 있는 이상현상에 대한 보고를 받았다.

1200001354.english: - Abnormal mutations in plants and animals, the Iron Worms using and moving through infrastructure, and unknown messages flooding in to the point of crashing our server.
1200001354.korean: - 식물과 동물의 이상변이, 철충의 인프라 사용과 이동 그리고 우리 서버를 마비시킬 정도로 쏟아져 들어온 알 수 없는 메시지.

1200001355.english: It seemed like something clicked for the doctor when they saw this message.
1200001355.korean: 닥터가 이 메시지를 보고 뭔가 떠오른 게 있는 것 같았어요.

1200001356.english: However, they said it's still in the realm of hypothesis, so they wouldn't speak carelessly.
1200001356.korean: 하지만 아직 가설의 영역이라 함부로 말은 하지 않겠다고 하더군요.

1200001358.english: - I thought for a moment, and then...

1200001359.english: It seems the commander has something in mind as well.

1200001360.english: I feel a little left out, like I'm the only one being excluded.
1200001360.korean: 저만 따돌림 당하는 느낌이라 살짝 서운하네요.

1200001361.english: - I was about to tell Shirayuri what I had come up with, but then I stopped myself.
1200001361.korean: - 나는 시라유리에게 내가 떠올린 것을 말하려다가 입을 다물었다.

1200001362.english: - As the doctor said, it's still just a hypothesis. And that's because there were some parts that were a little different from what I, or we, had heard before.
1200001362.korean: - 닥터의 말마따나 아직 가설이다. 그리고 내가, 우리가 기존에 들었던 것과는 조금 다른 부분이 있었기 때문이다.

1200001363.english: - Previously, the term "brothers" was used instead of "new citizens." And it was much longer than the message now.
1200001363.korean: - 기존에는 신민이라는 단어가 아닌 형제라는 단어를 사용했다. 그리고 지금 메시지보다 훨씬 길었다.

1200001364.english: - I could guess why the doctor was deliberately not speaking and said it could create prejudice.
1200001364.korean: - 닥터가 왜 일부러 말을 안하고 있는지, 선입견을 줄 수 있다고 말했는지 짐작이 갔다.

1200001365.english: - Because if you come up with a plausible answer when you're not getting a proper answer like now, your thoughts can get stuck on that.
1200001365.korean: - 지금처럼 제대로 된 답이 안 나온 상황에서 그럴싸한 답을 떠올리면 그쪽에 생각이 매몰될 수 있기 때문이다.

1200001366.english: - The Doctor and I are already buried. In the process of finding an answer, we also need people who think differently, like Shirayuri.
1200001366.korean: - 나와 닥터는 이미 매몰된 상태다. 답을 구하는 과정에서는 시라유리처럼 다르게 생각하는 사람도 필요하다.

1200001367.english: Well... since it's a valid reason, I won't pry. Because right now, we need someone with a different perspective.
1200001367.korean: 뭐… 합당한 이유니까 캐묻지는 않겠어요. 지금은 다른 시각을 가진 사람이 필요할 테니까요.

1200001368.english: No problem. It's just the obvious thing to do...

1200001369.english: The answer isn't clear, but the doctor said that in order to understand the cause of the current phenomena, we need to enter the invisible realm of Ironworm and conduct reconnaissance.
1200001369.korean: 답은 확실하지 않지만 닥터가 지금 현상들이 일어나고 있는 원인을 파악하기 위해서는 철충의 불가시 영역에 진입해서 정찰을 해야한다고 하더군요.

1200001371.english: Commander, I've already sent it to the panel.

1200001372.english: It's a place where we launched a double operation but couldn't reach the destination due to Ironworm and Marionette forces... Are we going to conduct reconnaissance again?
1200001372.korean: 양동작전을 펼쳤지만 철충과 마리오네트 군세 때문에 목적지까지 들어가지 못했던 곳인데… 한 번 더 정찰을 강행하나요?

1200001373.english: - It's almost impossible to obtain information about Ironworm without any risk.
1200001373.korean: - 아무런 리스크 없이 철충에 대한 정보를 얻는 것은 거의 불가능하다.

1200001374.english: - The only thing we can do is pursue safety as much as possible.
1200001374.korean: - 그나마 할 수 있는 것은 최대한 안전을 추구하는 것뿐이다.

1200001375.english: Unfortunately, due to the influx of Iron Blooded Beasts, we've lost our way of obtaining information about that area.
1200001375.korean: 안타깝게도 철충의 범람으로 인해서 그 근방의 정보를 입수할 방법을 잃었어요.

1200001376.english: Shall we set up an information infrastructure for that area?

1200001378.english: Then I'll upload the operation request form.

1200001379.english: People of the new world, gather at our nest...

1200001385.english: ...This is the area where AL Phantom scouted once.

1200001386.english: It's dangerous, but... let's do it.

1200001387.english: And could I get some information about Sevastopol?
1200001387.korean: 그리고 세바스토폴에 대한 정보를 알 수 있을까?

1200001388.english: If there are any resources left over. Europe's affairs are the priority right now.
1200001388.korean: 자원이 남으면. 지금은 유럽의 일이 우선이야.

1200001389.english: - I met Fafnir while wandering around Orca's residential area.
1200001389.korean: - 오르카의 거주구역을 돌아다니던 중에 파프니르와 만났다.

1200001390.english: You, you're after my treasure too, aren't you?
1200001390.korean: 너, 너도 내 보물을 노리고 있지?

1200001391.english: My gold keeps decreasing because I'm here!
1200001391.korean: 여기 있으니까 내 금이 계속 줄어든단 말이야!

1200001394.english: Ugh... It's not like I got robbed.

1200001395.english: While I was staying here, my subordinates kept asking me to buy this and that...
1200001395.korean: 여기에 머무르는 동안에 부하들이 이거 사달라 저거 사달라 막 이러고…

1200001396.english: They say there are many instances of payment in gold…

1200001398.english: It really annoys me that she says things like that while claiming to be the last human and getting everything for free.
1200001398.korean: 자기는 마지막 인간이라고 모든 것을 공짜로 제공받으면서 그런 소리를 하니 조금 열 받네.

1200001400.english: - The sound of it is strange?

1200001401.english: - PX… like when buying something at the Saman Supplies Office or Cafe Horizon, purchasing game items, or buying a work panel to use secretly under the covers… Just so you know, I got caught with this panel while lying in my bed with Alpha. I got scolded. A lot.
1200001401.korean: - PX… 삼안 물자 영업소 혹은 카페 호라이즌에서 뭔가를 살 때라던가, 게임 아이템 구매라던가, 몰래 이불 속에서 쓸 업무용 패널을 구매할 때라던가… 참고로 이 패널은 알파랑 같이 내 침대에 눕다가 들켰다. 혼났다. 많이.

1200001402.english: - Also, when doing second-hand transactions, when paying hush money to create an alibi, or when making a bet.
1200001402.korean: - 또 중고 거래를 할 때라던가, 알리바이를 만들기 위해서 입막음료를 지불할 때라던가, 내기를 할 때라던가.

1200001403.english: - And when buying gifts for the team members, or something like that.
1200001403.korean: - 그리고 대원들을 위한 선물을 살 때라던가.

1200001404.english: Why? There are hardly any bioroids that don't listen to you.
1200001404.korean: 왜? 바이오로이드들 중에 네 말 안 듣는 애들은 거의 없잖아.

1200001405.english: Can't you just tell them to hand it over?

1200001406.english: - There are reasons such as a decline in work motivation, the collapse of order, and adverse economic impacts, but…
1200001406.korean: - 근로의욕하락, 질서붕괴, 경제적 악영향 같은 이유가 있지만…

1200001409.english: - I lived because everyone in Orca was there. If it weren't for everyone in Orca, I would have died.
1200001409.korean: - 오르카의 모두가 있었기에 나는 살았다. 오르카의 모두가 없었다면 나는 죽었을 것이다.

1200001410.english: - Therefore, I belong to all of Orca.

1200001412.english: - That's strange... I've been hearing that a lot lately.
1200001412.korean: - 이상하다… 요즘 이상하다는 말을 많이 듣네?

1200001414.english: These bad guys are saying they'll switch to Orca if we don't buy it!
1200001414.korean: 이 나쁜 녀석들이 안 사주면 오르카로 전향한다고 말하잖아!

1200001415.english: How dare you threaten the captain!

1200001417.english: - I don't remember the exact wording, but it was probably something similar.
1200001417.korean: - 자세히 기억은 안 나지만 아마 비슷한 말일 것이다.

1200001418.english: This isn't what a boss is supposed to be! A boss is supposed to boss you around with just a nod!
1200001418.korean: 대장은 이런 게 아니잖아! 막 고갯짓으로 부려먹는 게 대장이잖아!

1200001419.english: - The Grand Master Fafnir was thinking of and the Grand Master Fafnir were quite far apart.
1200001419.korean: - 파프니르가 생각하는 대장상과 대장 파프니르는 한참 떨어져있었다.

1200001420.english: - However, I think the current captain, Fafnir, is a better captain.
1200001420.korean: - 하지만 나는 지금의 대장 파프니르가 더 좋은 대장이라고 생각한다.

1200001421.english: I came here promising to make the last human mine... but I ended up losing everything...
1200001421.korean: 마지막 인간을 내 것으로 만들겠다고 해서 왔는데… 내 금만 나가고…

1200001423.english: How can I make you mine?

1200001424.english: Don't, don't say things like that!
1200001424.korean: 너, 그, 그런 소리 하지 마!

1200001425.english: That Wristcut or whatever it was said and took all my gold.
1200001425.korean: 리스트컷인가 뭔가가 그런 소리하면서 내 금 다 뜯어갔단 말이야.

1200001426.english: - No wonder Wristcut always looked so good lately…
1200001426.korean: - 어쩐지 요즘 리스트컷이 항상 기분 좋아 보이더라니…

1200001427.english: Trying to gloss over it with this…

1200001428.english: I will absolutely never drink cheap stuff!

1200001429.english: I'm going to order the most expensive one!

1200001430.english: - I brought Fafnir to the PX… … Orca Branch of the Saman Industrial Materials Sales Office.
1200001430.korean: - 파프니르를 PX…… 삼안 산업 물자 영업소 오르카 지부로 데려왔다.

1200001431.english: - Fafnir chose the most expensive drink.
1200001431.korean: - 파프니르는 음료수 중에 제일 비싼 걸 골랐다.

1200001432.english: - I chose the one I usually drink.

1200001433.english: - And when I was doing the calculations, I noticed.
1200001433.korean: - 그리고 계산을 할 때에 나는 알아차렸다.

1200001436.english: The Saman Industrial Materials Sales Office refuses credit, Commander?
1200001436.korean: 삼안 산업 물자 영업소는 외상을 사절한답니다, 사령관님?

1200001441.english: They say there's no free lunch in the world.

1200001442.english: Because it's a world where the value of gold has significantly decreased.

1200001443.english: Huh? No, it's not. I'm a salaryman too, you know?

1200001444.english: Human, of course. So, a lot of things are handled with public funds, but personal items are paid for out of pocket.
1200001444.korean: 인간이지. 그래서 공금으로 처리되는 게 많지만 개인용품은 사재로 지불해.

1200001446.english: That's something other people hate. So I'm not going to do it.
1200001446.korean: 다른 사람들이 싫어하는 짓이잖아. 그래서 안 해.

1200001447.english: And there's one thing Fafnir misunderstands.
1200001447.korean: 그리고 파프니르가 오해하는 게 하나 있어.

1200001448.english: It's not that Orca is mine. I belong to all the Orcas.
1200001448.korean: 오르카가 내 것인 게 아냐. 내가 오르카 모두의 것이야.

1200001449.english: Isn't that the same for Fafnir?

1200001450.english: Isn't Fafnir buying her subordinates things because they want them?
1200001450.korean: 파프니르도 부하들이 원하니까 이것저것 사주는 거 아냐?

1200001451.english: I'm reminded of something a queen I know once said.
1200001451.korean: 내가 아는 여왕님이 했던 말이 떠오르네.

1200001452.english: Determining someone's position is not a privilege, but a responsibility.
1200001452.korean: 누군가의 위치를 결정하는 건 특권이 아니라 책임이다.

1200001453.english: Fafnir's subordinates probably follow her because she takes responsibility, right?
1200001453.korean: 파프니르가 책임을 지니까 부하들이 따르는 거겠지?

1200001454.english: I'm already everyone's in Orca, you know?

1200001455.english: How much have you looked into so far?

1200001456.english: I can't enter Fafnir's treasure vault, but I'll buy you a drink.
1200001456.korean: 내가 파프니르의 보물고에 들어가지는 못하지만 마실 것 정도는 사줄게.

1200001460.english: There are too many Iron Blooded and Marionettes.

1200001461.english: All existing entrances are currently blocked.

1200001462.english: We need to find a new way forward.

1200001463.english: It seems different from when I came here...
1200001463.korean: 길이 올 때랑 달라진 듯 한데…

1200001465.english: The map I made when entering is completely different from how the road looks now.
1200001465.korean: 진입하면서 만든 지도와 지금 길의 모습이 전혀 다릅니다.

1200001466.english: And my sensors are malfunctioning as well.
1200001466.korean: 그리고 제 센서도 이상 작동하고 있습니다.

1200001467.english: Me too. My senses are off.

1200001468.english: It seems there's a strange gas mixed in the air here.
1200001468.korean: 여기 공기에 이상한 가스가 섞여 있는 거 같군.

1200001469.english: Even the strange waves are affecting me.

1200001473.english: We can't keep running away like this forever.
1200001473.korean: 언제까지 이렇게 도망만 다닐 수는 없습니다.

1200001474.english: Now, you won't survive by finding a way out, you'll have to create one.
1200001474.korean: 지금은 활로를 찾는 것이 아니라 활로를 만들어야 살 수 있을 겁니다.

1200001475.english: I will clear the path and lure the enemies.

1200001476.english: In the meantime, AL Phantom, escape first.

1200001479.english: It's not for you, but for the success of the mission.
1200001479.korean: 당신을 위해서가 아니라 임무의 성공을 위해서입니다.

1200001480.english: Our goal isn't to all escape here alive, but to safely deliver the information we've obtained to Orca.
1200001480.korean: 우리의 목적은 전부 살아서 이곳을 탈출하는 것이 아니라 우리가 얻은 정보를 무사히 오르카에 전달하는 겁니다.

1200001481.english: If my chances of getting out were higher, I would have gotten out.
1200001481.korean: 만약 제가 빠져나갈 확률이 더 높았으면 제가 빠져나갔을 겁니다.

1200001483.english: You don't need to get everything out. Either one. No, it doesn't matter if neither of us can get out of here, as long as we can just pass on the information.
1200001483.korean: 전부 빠져나갈 필요는 없습니다. 둘 중에 하나라도. 아니, 둘 다 여기를 못 빠져나가도 정보만 전달할 수 있으면 상관없습니다.

1200001485.english: Don't you trust me? I'm the one who survived until now. Surely you won't die, will you? I will definitely return alive. After this mission is over, let's go to karaoke together.
1200001485.korean: 저를 못 믿으십니까? 지금까지 살아남은 접니다. 설마 죽기야 하겠습니까? 꼭 살아돌아가겠습니다. 이번 임무가 끝나면 같이 노래방이라도 가시죠.

1200001486.english: Why do words meant to reassure me make me even more anxious?
1200001486.korean: 안심시키려는 말이 왜 더 불안함을 불러일으키는 거지?

1200001487.english: And, she doesn't really like karaoke.
1200001487.korean: 그, 그리고 노래방은 별로 안 좋아해.

1200001489.english: Yeah. Definitely. Together. Let's go to karaoke.

1200001492.english: So... reassuring words actually make me more anxious...
1200001492.korean: 그러니까… 안심시키는 말들이 더 불안하게 만든다니까…

1200001495.english: Power source casing damaged. Mission duration: 3091 seconds. Cloaking device main circuit overheating. Left arm drive angle below 40%.
1200001495.korean: 동력원 외피 파손. 임무 지속 가능 시간 3091초. 은폐장 메인 회로 과열. 좌완부 구동각도 40%이하.

1200001496.english: Current combat power is at 30% of normal.

1200001497.english: The chances of a safe return are extremely low. But...
1200001497.korean: 무사히 복귀할 가능성은 지극히 낮음. 하지만…

1200001498.english: The mission has a good chance of success.

1200001499.english: - The AL Phantom, who was scouting in the invisible area of the Iron Insect, has returned.
1200001499.korean: - 철충의 불가시 영역으로 정찰을 하던 팬텀이 복귀했다.

1200001500.english: Commander. Information acquired from the invisible realm has been transmitted!
1200001500.korean: 사령관님. 불가시 영역에서 취득한 정보를 전송했습니다!

1200001501.english: So please grant me entry permission again!

1200001502.english: No! It's okay! I'm healthy! So, permission to reenter!
1200001502.korean: 아뇨! 괜찮아요! 저 건강해요! 그러니까 다시 진입 허가를!

1200001511.english: After defeating the Iron Beasts and Marionettes, I found the original path we had entered through.
1200001511.korean: 철충과 마리오네트를 무찌르니까 우리가 진입했던 원래 길이 있더군요.

1200001512.english: After that, I avoided further engagement and quickly returned.
1200001512.korean: 그 이후에는 교전을 피하고 빠르게 복귀했습니다.

1200001515.english: Didn't you say you'd definitely come back alive?

1200001517.english: And while we were forming the rescue team, AL Phantom returned.
1200001517.korean: 그리고 구조팀을 구성하던 중에 팬텀이 복귀했습니다.

1200001519.english: I'm sorry. I'm sorry for causing you worry.

1200001521.english: Shade will pay for the karaoke.

1200001523.english: Let me show you my honed singing skills.
1200001523.korean: 저의 갈고 닦은 노래 실력을 들려드리지요.

1200001524.english: No. You're not in a condition to go back on duty.
1200001524.korean: 안돼. 다시 임무로 돌아갈 몸상태가 아니잖아.

1200001525.english: AL Phantom, it's an order. Rest now.

1200001526.english: Even Shade said he had to rescue AL Phantom as soon as he returned.
1200001526.korean: 쉐이드도 복귀하자마자 팬텀을 구조해야 한다고 말했어.

1200001528.english: Vise Admiral HQ1 Albatross, Major General Nashorn, and Major General Uroborus are unable to attend as they are on separate missions.
1200001528.korean: 알바트로스 중장, 나스호른 소장과 우로보로스 소장은 별도의 임무 중이라 참석하지 못했소.

1200001529.english: I will send the minutes of the meeting to those three separately later.
1200001529.korean: 그 셋에게는 나중에 별도로 회의록을 보내도록 하겠습니다.

1200001531.english: Then, I will inform you of the information obtained today by AL Phantom and Shade from the invisible area of Ironworm.
1200001531.korean: 그러면 금일 팬텀과 쉐이드가 철충의 불가시 영역에서 획득한 정보를 알려드리겠습니다.

1200001532.english: AL Phantom and Shade entered the invisible zone of the Iron Plague at 02:10 today. At 11:23, we successfully photographed a massive structure located at the center of the invisible area.
1200001532.korean: 팬텀과 쉐이드는 금일 0210시 철충의 불가시 영역에 진입. 1123시에 불가시 영역 중심부에 있던 거대한 건축물을 촬영하는 데 성공했습니다.

1200001535.english: Yes, an artifact created by Ironworm. It's the Iron Tower.
1200001535.korean: 네, 철충이 만들어낸 인공물. 철의 탑입니다.

1200001536.english: Comparing it with existing information, I confirmed that the iron tower I saw in Sevastopol has a structure almost identical in appearance.
1200001536.korean: 기존 정보와 대조하여 세바스토폴에서 봤던 철의 탑과 외향상 거의 동일한 구조임을 확인했습니다.

1200001537.english: What is the function of the Iron Tower?

1200001538.english: Unfortunately, I haven't been able to figure that out yet.

1200001539.english: However, we confirmed that iron-type enemies and marionettes are densely concentrated around the Iron Tower, and we believe the Iron Tower will play a significant role for the iron-type enemies.
1200001539.korean: 하지만 철의 탑을 중심으로 철충과 마리오네트가 밀집되어 있는 것을 확인했으며 철의 탑이 철충에게 중요한 역할을 할 것이라고 판단했습니다.

1200001540.english: We have also confirmed that anomalies are occurring around the Iron Tower.
1200001540.korean: 또한 철의 탑을 중심으로 이상현상이 발생하고 있는 것도 확인했습니다.

1200001541.english: Plants and animals have merged with the Alterium, completely changing their original properties, and the Bioroids near the Iron Insect territory have also disappeared.
1200001541.korean: 동식물이 알터리움과 결합하여 기존의 성질과 완전히 달라졌고, 철충의 영역 근처에 있던 바이오로이드들도 실종되었습니다.

1200001542.english: To quote the doctor. Just as we don't need to understand and use all technology, you said we don't need to understand the entire Iron Tower to know its negative effects.
1200001542.korean: 닥터의 말을 인용하자면. 우리가 모든 과학 기술을 이해하면서 이용하는 게 아닌 것처럼 철의 탑을 전부 이해해야 악영향을 알 수 있는 것은 아니라고 했습니다.

1200001543.english: I propose we destroy the Iron Tower.

1200001544.english: With the recent increase in activity of the Iron Worms, we need to move quickly.
1200001544.korean: 최근 철충의 활동이 활발해짐에 따라 신속하게 움직일 필요가 있어요.

1200001545.english: What is the scale of the enemy we will face during the operation?

1200001546.english: The operation area is within the invisible range of Ironworm, so we couldn't fully grasp it.
1200001546.korean: 작전 구역이 철충의 불가시 영역 내부이기에 완벽하게 파악하지는 못했습니다.

1200001547.english: However... it's said to be so dense that it's difficult for AL Phantom and Shade to infiltrate.
1200001547.korean: 하지만… 팬텀과 쉐이드가 잠입하기 힘들 정도로 밀도가 높다고 합니다.

1200001548.english: Could a large-scale bombardment break through the defenses and allow the mobile force to penetrate deep into the enemy lines?
1200001548.korean: 대규모 포격으로 방어진을 무너트리고 기동부대의 종심돌파는 가능하겠나?

1200001549.english: I think it'll be difficult, after all. The depth is too profound. The enemy's density was too high, and I didn't understand the terrain either. There's too high a chance of being bogged down and surrounded before reaching the Iron Tower.
1200001549.korean: 아무래도… 힘들겠지. 종심이 너무 깊다. 적의 밀집도도 너무 높고 지형 파악도 되지 않았지. 철의 탑에 도달하기 전에 돈좌되어 포위당할 가능성이 너무 높다.

1200001551.english: We haven't been able to evacuate the androids near the operational area yet. And whether it's missiles or bombing, it will be difficult to reach the target. The probability of being intercepted is high.
1200001551.korean: 작전구역 근처의 바이오로이드들을 미처 대피시키지 못한 상황이에요. 그리고 미사일이든 폭격이든 목표에 도달하기는 힘들 거예요. 요격당할 확률이 높아요.

1200001552.english: T-8W Valkyrie. What is the state of Valhalla's supplies?

1200001553.english: The food supply is not a problem, but a large amount of ammunition was consumed in the war with the previous Delta and handed over to Caracas. It depends on the combat situation, but it's usually around 4 months to a year.
1200001553.korean: 식량 공급은 문제가 없지만 탄약은 이전 델타와의 전쟁에서 소모한 양과 카라카스에 인계한 양이 많습니다. 전투 상황에 따라 달라지겠지만 짧으면 4개월 길면 1년 정도입니다.

1200001554.english: I heard that shortly after I went into hibernation, you launched an offensive to recapture New Delhi, which had been occupied by the Iron Worms, but it failed. Could you tell me what factors led to the failure?
1200001554.korean: 내가 동면에 든 직후에 철충이 점령한 뉴델리를 탈환하기 위한 공세를 펼쳤다가 실패했다고 들었소. 어떤 요인으로 인해 실패했는지 알려주겠소?

1200001555.english: Thanks to their ugly infighting during the war to monopolize command and glory, the offensive was a complete disaster, even worse than a defeat. It's not a battle worth referencing.
1200001555.korean: 전쟁 중에도 지휘권과 공을 독차지하기 위해서 추악하게 싸움을 펼친 덕분에 졸전 그 이상의 졸전을 펼친 공세였다. 참고할만한 전투는 아니다.

1200001556.english: - The commanders of Orca's combat units were holding a meeting to plan the operation to destroy the Iron Tower.
1200001556.korean: - 철의 탑 파괴를 위한 작전을 위해 오르카의 전투부대 지휘관들이 회의를 진행하고 있었다.

1200001557.english: - Even before the destruction, such a sight would not have been possible.
1200001557.korean: - 멸망 이전에도 이런 광경은 볼 수 없었을 것이다.

1200001558.english: - As Indomitable Marie said, even when humanity was on the brink of destruction, they fought for their own gain.
1200001558.korean: - 마리가 말했던 것처럼 인류는 멸망을 앞둔 때에도 자신의 이득을 위해서 싸웠다고 했으니.

1200001559.english: - But I couldn't just feel proud of the scene unfolding before my eyes.
1200001559.korean: - 하지만 난 눈앞에 펼쳐진 광경에 뿌듯함만 느낄 수는 없었다.

1200001560.english: - As the authority was concentrated, so was the responsibility.
1200001560.korean: - 권한이 집중된 만큼 책임도 나에게 집중되어 있었다.

1200001561.english: - How can we get out of this situation?
1200001561.korean: - 어떻게 해야 이 상황을 타개할 수 있을까?

1200001562.english: - I stared at the photo of the Iron Tower, racking my brain and using all the knowledge I had.
1200001562.korean: - 나는 철의 탑 사진을 노려보며 내가 가진 지식을 총동원하여 고민했다.

1200001563.english: Continued in Part 3 of < The Golden One from Space >.

1200001565.english: Yes, I prepared a packed lunch to eat on the way, medicine, and some simple tools.
1200001565.korean: 네, 가면서 먹을 도시락이랑 의약품 그리고 간단한 공구도 준비했어요.

1200001572.english: Where are you preparing to sneak off to, Lord Azazel, Lord Saraqael?
1200001572.korean: 어딜 몰래 가려고 준비 중이십니까, 아자젤 님, 사라카엘 님?

1200001573.english: It's the village I went to before...

1200001574.english: Why do you intend to go back to a place where it is obvious you will be turned away?
1200001574.korean: 문전박대 당할 게 뻔한 곳에 왜 또 가려고 그러십니까?

1200001575.english: Because there are people there who need help.
1200001575.korean: 거기에 도움을 필요로 하는 사람들이 있으니까.

1200001578.english: Isn't that even a village where Iron Bugs used to appear?
1200001578.korean: 심지어 그곳은 철충도 출몰하던 마을 아닌가.

1200001579.english: How can I live in peace with such people around?
1200001579.korean: 그런 이들을 두고 어찌 평온하게 지낼 수 있겠나?

1200001580.english: There is no guarantee that good intentions will unconditionally help or please them.
1200001580.korean: 선의가 무조건 그들에게 도움이 되리라는 법도 좋아하리라는 법도 없습니다.

1200001582.english: Didn't the people there say that they were living peacefully, but the Iron Bugs ran rampant because we went there?
1200001582.korean: 그곳 사람들이 말하지 않았습니까, 자기들은 평온하게 지내는데 우리가 갔기에 철충들이 설쳤다고.

1200001583.english: What do you plan to do if this is true?

1200001584.english: What do you plan to do if that is a lie?

1200001585.english: If the Iron Bug has started becoming active even without us going, then defenseless people will be completely exposed to them.
1200001585.korean: 우리가 가지 않아도 철충이 활동하기 시작한 거라면 무방비한 사람들이 고스란히 철충에게 노출되는 거잖아요.

1200001586.english: And if the Iron Bug appeared in that village because we went there, wouldn't it be enough for us to just fight them?
1200001586.korean: 그리고 만약 우리가 갔기에 철충이 그 마을에 나타난 것이라고 하면 우리가 철충과 싸우면 될 일 아닌가.

1200001588.english: Do we not trust you that much?

1200001589.english: Even though we often forgot to clean, secretly ate snacks, were used to bring in prohibited items while doing volunteer work at the brig, and produced companion goods without permission…
1200001589.korean: 우리가 비록 자주 청소를 깜빡하고, 몰래 간식을 빼먹고, 영창에 봉사활동을 갔다가 반입 금지물품을 반입하게 이용당하고, 반려 굿즈 생산을 무단으로 진행하기는 했지만…

1200001590.english: ... ... it does seem a bit unreliable.

1200001591.english: It’s not that I don’t trust the two of you.
1200001591.korean: 두 분을 못 믿는 게 아닙니다.

1200001592.english: I just don't want the two of you to be hurt by non-believers.
1200001592.korean: 두 분께서 불신자들에게 상처를 받는 것이 싫을 뿐입니다.

1200001593.english: Let's go together. If I send just the two of you, I might have to handle something later.
1200001593.korean: 같이 가시죠. 두 분만 보내면 나중에 또 제가 뭔가 수습해야 할 일이 생길 수도 있으니까요.

1200001594.english: You're the one who'll pay the price even if we get punished?

1200001595.english: … … Why do you take it that way?

1200001598.english: Because I will not lose my respect for the two of you, just as much as my faith.
1200001598.korean: 저의 신앙심만큼 두 분에 대한 존경심은 잃지 않으니까요.

1200001599.english: I said I was converting before-

1200001600.english: Do you want me to show you the real conversion?

1200001603.english: Now, let's go, Lord Azazel, Lord Saraqael.
1200001603.korean: 자, 가시죠, 아자젤 님, 사라카엘 님.

1200001604.english: (How should I take an Inquisitor making a joke about conversion?)
1200001604.korean: (이단심문관이 개종에 관한 농담을 하는 걸 어떻게 받아들여야 할까요?)

1200001605.english: (Shh! As I always say, if you point this out, it becomes the truth. Just let it slide.)
1200001605.korean: (쉿! 언제나 말하지만 이런 건 지적하면 진담이 되어버린다. 그냥 넘어가라.)

1200001607.english: If the two of you who suggested going keep dawdling, what does that make me?
1200001607.korean: 가자고 했던 두 분이 꿈지럭거리면 제가 뭐가 됩니까?

1200001609.english: It seems like there are more Iron Bugs than before.
1200001609.korean: 전보다 철충의 수가 더 많아진 거 같네요.

1200001611.english: Lord Azazel, Lord Saraqael. What do you intend to do if the village tells you to just go back again?
1200001611.korean: 아자젤 님, 사라카엘 님. 만약에 마을에서 또 그냥 돌아가라고 말하면 어쩔 생각이십니까?

1200001612.english: What? Then can't we just leave these supplies behind and go?
1200001612.korean: 네? 그러면 이 물자들을 두고 떠나면 되는 거 아닌가요?

1200001613.english: It doesn't benefit us at all, does it?

1200001614.english: We follow faith and morality, not profit.
1200001614.korean: 우리는 신앙과 도덕을 따르지 이득을 따르지 않는다.

1200001616.english: Sometimes, please let the profit follow as well.

1200001617.english: The budget for the denomination does not just fall from the sky…
1200001617.korean: 교단을 위한 예산이 하늘에서 그냥 떨어지는 게 아닙니다…

1200001618.english: Should I get a part-time job?

1200001619.english: Come to think of it, it seems like a lot of cafe part-time job postings have been popping up lately...
1200001619.korean: 그러고보니 요즘 카페 아르바이트 공고가 많이 올라오던 거 같던데…

1200001621.english: Haven't you seen the uniform that is practically underwear?

1200001622.english: If you wear that uniform while adhering to our denomination's doctrine, you will be taken into custody by the City Guard...
1200001622.korean: 우리 교단 교리를 따른 채로 그 유니폼을 입었다가는 시티가드에서 연행합니다…

1200001623.english: And… it is enough just for the two of you to be there.
1200001623.korean: 그리고… 두 분은 그냥 계신 것만으로도 충분합니다.

1200001624.english: I can handle the budget concerns on my own.
1200001624.korean: 예산에 관한 고민은 저 혼자 하면 되니까요.

1200001625.english: Because that is what the agent is there to do.

1200001626.english: But aren't they part of Kohei's family?

1200001627.english: I can't let you suffer alone.
1200001627.korean: 너 혼자만 고생하게 둘 수는 없다.

1200001629.english: In that case, please consult with me first before doing anything.
1200001629.korean: 그러면 무슨 일을 하시기 전에 먼저 상의 부탁드립니다.

1200001630.english: So that an unpleasant incident like the one involving the Savior merchandise this time does not happen again.
1200001630.korean: 이번에 있었던 구원자님 굿즈 같은 불미스러운 일이 다시 일어나지 않게 말입니다.

1200001632.english: Fortunately, the Savior bought up all the merchandise... and thanks to their consideration in treating it as if it were ordered by the Savior rather than made by Kohei, there was almost no loss.
1200001632.korean: 그래도 다행히 구원자님께서 굿즈를 전부 사들여서... 코헤이에서 만든 굿즈가 아니라 구원자님께서 발주한 것으로 취급되도록 배려해주신 덕분에 손해는 거의 없었습니다.

1200001633.english: If it weren't for you, my savior, I would have gone a year without snacks.
1200001633.korean: 구원자님이 아니었으면 1년 동안 간식 없는 생활을 할 뻔했습니다.

1200001637.english: The situation in the village is unusual.

1200001638.english: That's... an Iron Bug and... a Marionette?

1200001639.english: Why are there Iron Bugs and Marionettes in the village?

1200001641.english: If the village is in a cooperative relationship with the Iron Bug, going to the village would be meaningless...
1200001641.korean: 마을이 철충과 협력관계면 마을에 가도 의미가 없을 것이고…

1200001642.english: Even if the village isn't in a cooperative relationship with the Iron Bug, there wouldn't be anyone alive and well in the village.
1200001642.korean: 마을이 철충과 협력관계가 아니더라도 마을에 멀쩡히 살아있는 사람은 없겠죠.

1200001645.english: There might be some unknown survivors.
1200001645.korean: 혹시 모를 생존자가 있을 수도 있잖아요.

1200001646.english: And even if there are no survivors, we can reduce the number of Iron Bugs and Marionettes that will become our enemies.
1200001646.korean: 그리고 생존자가 없다고 하더라도 우리의 적이 될 철충과 마리오네트의 수를 줄일 수 있다.

1200001654.english: To be precise, there are no Bioroid corpses.

1200001655.english: The residents followed the Iron Worms, or perhaps...

1200001656.english: They might have turned them into corpses and taken them away.

1200001657.english: Either way, there's nothing we can do.
1200001657.korean: 어느 쪽이든 우리가 할 수 있는 일은 없겠군요.

1200001663.english: That's alright. Because we've defeated all the dangers.

1200001667.english: Suddenly coming to the village and... the people...

1200001668.english: They chased after even those who were running away...

1200001671.english: I, I was hiding down here... but Ironworm Ones kept staying in the village...
1200001671.korean: 저, 저는 여기 밑에 숨어있었는데… 철충들이 마을에 계속 남아서…

1200001673.english: Do you know which way they took her?

1200001674.english: Me, over there. Into the realm of the Iron Beasts...

1200001675.english: I'll contact Orca and be back.

1200001676.english: And then follow the Iron Worms.

1200001678.english: The people in this village are the ones who used to ostracize us.
1200001678.korean: 이 마을 사람들은 우리를 배척하던 사람들입니다.

1200001679.english: They were people we approached with good intentions, but who rejected us.
1200001679.korean: 우리가 선의로 다가갔지만 우리를 내치던 사람들인데.

1200001680.english: Why are you trying to save such people?

1200001682.english: Because it's the right thing to do.

1200001684.english: It seems I really do have to convert.

1200001685.english: Then... it's a shame, but... after this is over, we can talk seriously later...
1200001685.korean: 그, 그러면… 아쉽지만… 이번 일이 끝나고 나중에 진지하게 이야기를…

1200001686.english: Even at a time like this, you're joking...

1200001687.english: No, that's not what I meant.

1200001688.english: The fact that I think of retribution first and then generosity later suggests that my understanding of the teachings of light is still lacking.
1200001688.korean: 제가 응징을 먼저 떠올리고 베품을 나중에 떠올리는 것을 보면 빛의 가르침에 대한 이해가 아직 부족한 거 같습니다.

1200001690.english: I'd be happy to go with you both.

1200001691.english: What? You're saying you'll let me move?

1200001694.english: After all, abandoning the place where one has lived would not be an easy task.
1200001694.korean: 자신이 살던 터전을 버리는 것은 쉬운 일이 아닐 테니까요.

1200001695.english: Of course, it is not all good intentions.

1200001696.english: There is also an intention to identify the people within Orca's sphere of influence.
1200001696.korean: 오르카의 세력권 내에 있는 사람들을 파악하겠다는 의도도 있습니다.

1200001697.english: Um... where are you moving to?

1200001698.english: This is a residence managed by Orca.

1200001699.english: It is a place that guarantees at least basic necessities, welfare, and safety.
1200001699.korean: 최소한의 의식주와 복지, 안전은 보장하는 곳이죠.

1200001700.english: May I ask just one thing?

1200001701.english: Where is your sister moving to?

1200001702.english: I'll move both of you to the same place.

1200001703.english: Your older sister was worried about that first, too.
1200001703.korean: 너희 언니도 그걸 가장 먼저 걱정하더라.

1200001706.english: I've wanted to meet you so much all this time...

1200001708.english: You should have brought up my sister from the start.

1200001710.english: Why act like you're plotting a scheme when doing a good deed?
1200001710.korean: 착한 일을 하는데 왜 계략을 꾸미는 것처럼 할까?

1200001712.english: Come to think of it, Rouge was like that too.

1200001713.english: She plotted a scheme to save me…

1200001714.english: And a story only they know...

1200001715.english: Then, did the young lady sheriff tell you a story too?

1200001716.english: What is the sheriff talking about?

1200001717.english: The sheriff says that peace is the best.

1200001718.english: If the sheriff is dramatic, it means the town is full of problems.
1200001718.korean: 보안관이 드라마틱하면 그 마을은 문제 투성이라는 말이니까.

1200001719.english: Huh? I actually like slice-of-life stories, too?

1200001720.english: To others, it’s a slice-of-life story, but to the person involved, it’s their job.

1200001721.english: My daily life involves telling village kids that the sheriff will arrest them if they misbehave, breaking up marital disputes, and taking people home who are too drunk to go inside, rather than looking for criminals.
1200001721.korean: 범죄자를 찾는 것보다 마을 애들한테 나쁜 짓하면 보안관이 잡아간다라는 소리하고, 부부싸움하는 거 말리고, 취해서 집에 못 들어가는 사람들 집에 데려다 주는 게 일상인데.

1200001722.english: It sounds fun just listening to it.

1200001723.english: Who can stop this young lady's curiosity?

1200001724.english: Slice-of-life stories probably change depending on the era.

1200001725.english: In this day and age, when Iron Bugs appear, defeating them must be the daily routine, right?
1200001725.korean: 지금 시대는 철충이 나타났을 때에는 철충을 무찌르는 게 일상이겠지?

1200001726.english: Alright! Let's try shooting a slice-of-life video!

1200001727.english: I went around all the target villages.

1200001728.english: Now I guess I just need to find a means of transportation?

1200001729.english: That is part of it, but the process of reducing people's burdens is also necessary.
1200001729.korean: 그것도 있지만 사람들의 짐을 줄이는 과정도 필요해요.

1200001730.english: Even if I tell them to take only the bare minimum, they won't easily give up the things they cherish and the things they have accumulated over the years.
1200001730.korean: 최소한의 짐만 가져가라고 말을 해도 소중히 여기는 것, 지금까지 모아놓은 게 있다보니 그것들은 쉽게 포기하지 않을 거예요.

1200001731.english: Orca should provide most daily necessities...
1200001731.korean: 오르카가 생필품은 대부분 제공해 줄 텐데…

1200001732.english: Because material things aren't the only things needed in life.
1200001732.korean: 물질적인 것만 삶에 필요한 건 아니니까요.

1200001733.english: Like how I stick with the Presley even though there is a bike with better performance?
1200001733.korean: 내가 더 좋은 성능의 바이크가 있어도 프레슬리를 고집하는 것처럼?

1200001734.english: Then tell me to cut down on drinking.

1200001735.english: What if you crash into something while riding a bike after drinking?
1200001735.korean: 술 마시고 바이크 타다가 어디에 박으면 어쩌려고?

1200001736.english: I'm the type who drives better when I drink.
1200001736.korean: 나는 술 마시면 운전을 더 잘하는 타입이라.

1200001737.english: Isn't that a drunk driver's go-to line?
1200001737.korean: 그거 음주 운전자의 단골 레퍼토리 아냐?

1200001738.english: Is it okay for a sheriff to say something like that?

1200001739.english: guess I caught it because I come into contact with drunk drivers often.
1200001739.korean: 음주 운전자랑 접할 일이 많아서 옮았나 보지.

1200001740.english: He who fights monsters must be careful lest he become a monster himself. If you gaze into the abyss for too long, the abyss will gaze back at you.
1200001740.korean: 괴물과 싸우는 사람은 그 싸움 속에서 스스로 괴물이 되지 않도록 조심해야 한다. 당신이 심연을 오랫동안 들여다본다면, 심연 또한 당신을 들여다볼 것이다.

1200001741.english: I guess it's already too late for me.

1200001742.english: Judging by the way you're talking... I thought the smell you're giving off was just my imagination, but you've already had a drink, haven't you?
1200001742.korean: 말하는 투를 보니… 지금 풍기는 냄새 내 착각이라고 생각했는데 벌써 한잔했지?

1200001744.english: I'm under a different jurisdiction than the City Guard, you know? If the City Guard arrests me, it's interference in internal affairs, you know?
1200001744.korean: 나는 시티 가드랑 관할이 다르거든? 시티 가드가 나 잡아가면 내정 간섭이거든?

1200001745.english: Is it okay to say something like that in front of the commander's direct secretary?
1200001745.korean: 사령관 직속 비서 앞에서 그런 소리를 해도 돼?

1200001747.english: Iron Iron Annie is currently performing her role well.
1200001747.korean: 지금 아이언 애니는 자신의 역할을 잘 수행하고 있습니다.

1200001748.english: If the City Guard takes her away now, there will be a security vacuum during her absence.
1200001748.korean: 지금 그녀를 시티 가드가 잡아가면 그녀가 부재하는 동안에 치안에 공백이 생겨요.

1200001749.english: It won't be too late to hire a replacement later when one becomes available.
1200001749.korean: 나중에 대체 인력이 생기면 잡아넣어도 늦지 않습니다.

1200001750.english: Hearing that from the young lady, of all people, makes me really anxious.
1200001750.korean: 다른 사람도 아니고 아가씨한테 그런 소리를 들으니까 엄청 불안해지는데.

1200001751.english: Surely this isn't a confirmed future, is it?

1200001752.english: Hehe, well, I wonder? What do you think?

1200001753.english: I'm telling you, this young lady has a villainous attitude.

1200001755.english: Then, shall we go back and try to find a means of transportation?

1200001756.english: There’s no real need to transport it all at once, right?
1200001756.korean: 굳이 한 번에 수송할 필요는 없겠지?

1200001757.english: … … No, I think we need to transport it all at once?
1200001757.korean: ……아니, 한 번에 수송해야 할 거 같은데?

1200001760.english: I've been seeing Iron Bugs' faces often lately?

1200001762.english: We will need to revise the plan.

1200001763.english: To revise the plan, we'll have to defeat those Iron Bugs first, right?
1200001763.korean: 계획 수정을 위해서는 먼저 저 철충들부터 무찔러야겠지?

1200001765.english: I can't be the main character of the story.

1200001766.english: The dialogue is cliché and uncool.

1200001767.english: D-drama, you know, lines that fit the mood are the best!
1200001767.korean: 대, 대사는 분위기에 맞는 대사가 좋은 거잖아!

1200001768.english: There wouldn't have been a problem if you hadn't tackled me!
1200001768.korean: 네가 태클만 안 걸었으면 문제 없었다고!

1200001769.english: I should move up the date of my move.

1200001770.english: The Metal Parasite's activity cycle is faster than predicted.

1200001771.english: What is the mode of transportation?

1200001772.english: I'll have to make do with what I've managed to get so far.

1200001773.english: If it doesn't work, we'll have to move on foot.

1200001774.english: And because of the Iron Worm's activity, the number of people hoping to relocate has increased.
1200001774.korean: 그리고 철충의 활동 때문에 이주 희망자가 늘었어요.

1200001775.english: Everyone in the village will want to move.
1200001775.korean: 마을의 모든 사람들이 이주를 희망할 거예요.

1200001776.english: How should I think of it as fortunate...?

1200001777.english: Then I'll stay here and protect the people.
1200001777.korean: 그러면 나는 여기에 남아서 사람들 지키고 있을 게.

1200001778.english: Iron Annie and Cardinal Armand, hurry back and send a vehicle.
1200001778.korean: 애니랑 아르망은 잽싸게 돌아가서 운송수단을 보내줘.

1200001781.english: I'm the Ace of Clubs, the symbol of friendship and happiness.
1200001781.korean: 나는 우정과 행복의 상징 클로버 에이스야.

1200001782.english: Could someone like me ever break a promise to a close friend?
1200001782.korean: 그런 내가 친우와의 맹세를 깨트릴 리가 있겠어?

1200001784.english: You're more narrow-minded than you look... Are you retaliating right away because I interrupted your line earlier?
1200001784.korean: 보기보다 속 좁네… 아까 대사에 태클 걸었다고 곧장 반격하는 거야?

1200001785.english: A sheriff needs a good memory.

1200001786.english: I told you not to use that good memory for holding grudges...
1200001786.korean: 그 좋은 기억력을 원한 가지는 데 쓰지 말라고…

1200001787.english: How can I ever forget this grudge?

1200001788.english: So, stay safe until this grudge is settled, young lady.
1200001788.korean: 그러니 이 원한 풀기 전까지 무사해, 아가씨.

1200001790.english: If you really come back, I'm going to hit you!
1200001790.korean: 진짜 돌아오면 한 대 칠 거야!

1200001793.english: Master? I'm, I'm happy. It was really... this look... I was very embarrassed, but when I thought Master would eat it, the joy outweighed the embarrassment. And... right now, I'm so happy that... My heart is pounding so hard... it's melting the cream and ice cream... would you like to eat it before it all melts? And... will you love me even more?
1200001793.korean: 주인님? 기, 기뻐요. 엄청… 이 모습이… 많이 부끄럽긴 했지만 주인님께서 드실 거라고 생각하면 부끄러움보다는 기쁨이 더 컸어요. 그리고… 지금은 너무 기뻐서... 가슴이 너무 뛰어서… 크림과 아이스크림이 녹을 정도에요… 다 녹기 전에 드시겠어요? 그리고… 마저 사랑해주시겠어요?

1200001794.english: I'm not sure if my master likes or dislikes mint chocolate. But, it's okay! Hachiko of Castling really, really loves his master, regardless of things like that! More than meat pie, more than mint chocolate! I love you the most in the world, Master!
1200001794.korean: 주인님이 민트초코를 좋아하시는지, 싫어하시는지는 잘 모르겠어요. 하지만, 괜찮아요! 하치코는 그런거랑 상관 없이 주인님을 정말정말 좋아하니까요! 미트파이보다 더, 민트초코보다 더요! 세상에서 제일 좋아해요, 주인님!

1200001795.english: Today is the day I give my master a gift, and my master should be the happiest... but I didn't expect them to give me something like this. This is like me getting a gift. And that too, the most wonderful gift in the world, a master. Hoo hoo. This gift is something I will cherish and love for the rest of my life.  Thank you, my beloved master.
1200001795.korean: 오늘은 제가 주인님께 선물을 드리는 날인데, 주인님께서 가장 행복하셔야 하는데… 이런 걸 주실 줄이야. 이래서는 제가 선물을 받는 날이네요. 그것도, 세상에서 가장 멋진, 주인님이라는 선물을. 후후. 이 선물은 제가 평생동안 아끼고 사랑하도록 할게요. 감사합니다, 사랑하는 주인님.

1200001796.english: Actually, sis... I took leave on purpose to spend time with the commander... I even adjusted my leave to match the commander's schedule, you know? It's a bit of a sneaky move, but the commander is so busy.  But I never expected you to prepare such a gift... I was really touched, sis. I love our Commander so much, you know? Let’s stay together forever!
1200001796.korean: 사실, 누나… 사령관이랑 같이 시간을 보내고 싶어서… 일부러 사령관 스케줄에 맞춰서 휴가를 냈거든? 조금 약삭빠른 짓이지만… 사령관은 워낙 바쁘니까. 그런데, 이런 선물을 준비하고 있었을 줄이야… 누나 정말 감동했거든. 우리 사령관, 누나가 많이 사랑하거든? 앞으로도 쭉 함께 하자!

1200001797.english: - The meetings to destroy the Iron Tower went on endlessly.
1200001797.korean: - 철의 탑 파괴를 위한 회의는 끝없이 이어졌다.

1200001798.english: - It was only natural, as military experts who had mastered all strategies from East and West, past and present, and could create new strategies based on those, had gathered there.
1200001798.korean: - 동서고금의 모든 전략을 익히고 그 전략을 기반으로 새로운 전략을 만들어 낼 수 있는 군사전문가들이 모여 있었으니 당연했다.

1200001799.english: - But the longer the meeting went on, the more hopeless I felt.
1200001799.korean: - 하지만 회의가 길어지면 길어질수록 막막함만 늘어났다.

1200001800.english: - The tunnel operation using The old tunnel proposed by The Invincible Dragon, The feint proposed by Indomitable Marie, The large-scale strategic and tactical bombardment and bombing using all available means of fire proposed by May, The decoy tactics proposed by Leona, The wave tactics proposed by Khan, and The preparatory fire and maneuver warfare proposed by Arsenal...
1200001800.korean: - 무적의 용이 제안한 옛 터널을 이용한 땅굴 작전도, 마리가 제안한 양동작전도, 메이가 제안한 모든 투발수단을 동원한 대규모 전략전술 포격과 폭격도, 레오나가 제안한 유인전술도, 칸이 제안한 제파전술도, 아스널이 제안한 공격준비사격과 기동전도…

1200001802.english: - There were many reasons, but the fundamental one was simple.
1200001802.korean: - 여러가지 이유가 있지만 근본적인 이유는 간단했다.

1200001803.english: - There were too many Iron Bugs.

1200001804.english: - I said the prince doesn't need military strategy.

1200001805.english: - This was a very troublesome statement for someone who had to face a large army.
1200001805.korean: - 이는 대군을 상대해야 하는 입장에게는 무척이나 골치 아픈 말이었다.

1200001806.english: - Of course, all these operations could be effective in the long run.
1200001806.korean: - 물론 이 모든 작전이 장기적으로 보면 유효할 수도 있을 것이다.

1200001807.english: - However, strange phenomena continued to occur around the Iron Tower.
1200001807.korean: - 하지만 철의 탑을 중심으로 기이한 현상이 계속 이어지고 있었다.

1200001808.english: - Time is a resource given equally to us and Ironworm. While we were preparing, Ironworm also had time to prepare in various ways.
1200001808.korean: - 시간은 우리에게도 철충에게도 공평하게 주어진 자원이다. 우리가 준비하는 시간동안 철충도 여러가지 준비를 할 수 있었다.

1200001809.english: How about high-altitude jumping? You mean the Iron Golem starts its descent from a height the Iron Golem can't perceive, slows down at a suitable altitude, and lands on the Tower of Iron?
1200001809.korean: 고고도 강하는 어떻소? 철충이 인지할 수 없는 높이에서 강하를 시작해서 적합한 고도에서 속도를 줄여 철의 탑에 착륙하는 것 말이오.

1200001810.english: This kind of thing is more Uroboros or Spartan Captain's specialty than mine...
1200001810.korean: 이런 건 나보다 우로보로스나 스파르탄 캡틴 전문인데…

1200001811.english: It would be better for the Air Force to land than the Army.
1200001811.korean: 육군보다는 공군이 강하하는 것이 좋을 거야.

1200001812.english: If the army slowly descends by parachute, they'll be wiped out by Ironworm without being able to mount a proper counterattack.
1200001812.korean: 육군이 낙하산으로 느긋하게 하강하면 철충들에게 제대로 된 반격도 하지 못하고 몰살당하겠지.

1200001813.english: There are drop pods, but drop pods also need a process to slow down just before landing. They'll all be intercepted in the air eventually.
1200001813.korean: 드랍포드도 있지만 드랍포드도 결국에는 낙하 직전에 속도를 줄이는 과정이 필요해. 결국에는 공중에서 다 요격당할 거야.

1200001814.english: I also need data on how high Ironworm can detect.
1200001814.korean: 철충이 몇 km상공까지 인식할 수 있는지 자료도 필요해.

1200001815.english: If we can detect at altitudes higher than our air force can operate, high-altitude jumps will be difficult for both the army and the air force. Because it's hard to even get to the landing position.
1200001815.korean: 만약에 우리 공군들이 활동할 수 있는 고도보다 높은 고도까지 인식할 수 있으면 육군이든 공군이든 고고도 강하도 힘들거야. 강하위치까지 가는 것도 힘드니까.

1200001816.english: - The longer the meeting goes on, the more I realize how powerful Ironworm's forces are.
1200001816.korean: - 회의가 길어지면 길어질수록 철충의 전력이 얼마나 강대한지 자각하게 된다.

1200001817.english: - The meeting dragged on not because of whether it should be done or not, but because of whether it could be done or not.
1200001817.korean: - 해야 되느냐 마느냐가 아니라 할 수 있느냐 없느냐의 문제로 회의가 길어졌다.

1200001818.english: - Even meetings that were close to brainstorming reached a stalemate with no significant progress.
1200001818.korean: - 브레인스토밍에 가까운 회의 조차도 별다른 진전이 없어 소강상태에 접어들었다.

1200001819.english: - When everyone had quieted down. I presented the idea I had thought of in the middle.
1200001819.korean: - 모두가 잠잠해졌을 때. 나는 중간에 떠올렸던 의견을 제시했다.

1200001822.english: Are you saying you're going to requisition it?

1200001823.english: There's no need to borrow it.

1200001825.english: Except for Fafnir, Fafnir's subordinates cannot disobey their master's orders.
1200001825.korean: 파프니르를 제외한 파프니르의 부하들은 주군의 명령을 거역하지 못하오.

1200001826.english: While Fafnir claims to possess Haka, it's actually her subordinates who are doing the moving.
1200001826.korean: 파프니르는 하카를 소유했다고 말은 하지만 실질적으로 움직이는 것은 그녀의 부하들이오.

1200001827.english: You can get your subordinates to use the haka.
1200001827.korean: 부하들을 움직여 하카를 이용하면 될 거요.

1200001828.english: bioroids were created for humans. It has served its purpose.
1200001828.korean: 바이오로이드는 인간을 위해 만들어졌소. 그 쓰임을 다 하는 것이오.

1200001829.english: War is not won by those who pursue good. The strong win.
1200001829.korean: 전쟁은 선을 추구하는 자가 이기는 것이 아니오. 강한 자가 이기는 거요.

1200001830.english: A leader of virtue is one who shows kindness to their subordinates. Showing kindness to enemies and civilians are separate matters. There were also those who were virtuous leaders but incompetent generals.
1200001830.korean: 덕장은 부하들에게 덕을 베푸는 자를 말하오. 적과 민간인에게 덕을 베푸는 것은 별개의 일이오. 덕장이지만 장수로서는 무능한 자도 있었소.

1200001831.english: Even those called wise rulers are benevolent to their own people but can also be cruel conquerors in foreign lands.
1200001831.korean: 성군이라 불린 자도 자국의 민초들에게는 덕이 있는 군주지만 동시에 외국에서는 잔인한 정복 군주일 수 있소.

1200001832.english: Are you saying it's virtuous to let your own people's blood flow out of fear of the blood of others flowing?
1200001832.korean: 다른 자의 피가 흐르는 것이 두려워 아군의 피가 흐르게 두는 것을 덕이라 할 수 있소?

1200001833.english: And considering that Fafnir's gang has never been exposed until now, even if we change Haka into Orca's possession, no one will know.
1200001833.korean: 그리고 파프니르 일당이 지금까지 실체가 드러나지 않았던 점을 생각하면 하카를 오르카의 소유물로 바꾸더라도 아무도 모를 것이오.

1200001837.english: The results are only reflected if they also achieve the purpose.

1200001838.english: The ideal the lord pursues is a fantasy.

1200001839.english: We are living in a reality that is merely things and phenomena.
1200001839.korean: 사물과 현상에 불과한 현실을 우리가 살아가고 있소.

1200001842.english: Without a tremor. Please don't hesitate and move forward.
1200001842.korean: 흔들림 없이. 머뭇거리지 말고 나아가주시길 바라오.

1200001843.english: My lord, whatever path you choose to take, it is the right path for me, for us.
1200001843.korean: 주군이 나아가는 길은 그 어떠한 길이든 소관에게, 우리에게 옳은 길이니.

1200001844.english: Show us the ideal the lord dreams of.

1200001845.english: - I realized why the invincible dragon opposed me.
1200001845.korean: - 나는 무적의 용이 왜 나와 대립했는지 알아차렸다.

1200001846.english: - It was to confirm my determination and to have it confirmed by the other commanders.
1200001846.korean: - 나의 각오를 확인하고, 다른 지휘관들에게 확인을 시켜주기 위함이었다.

1200001847.english: - It reminded me of what you said to me on the beach a long time ago.
1200001847.korean: - 옛날 해변에서 나에게 했던 말을 상기시켜주었다.

1200001848.english: Then, let's discuss the possible operations when renting a Haka.
1200001848.korean: 그러면 하카를 대여했을 때에 가능한 작전에 대해서 논하도록 하죠.

1200001849.english: Because there's no way they'll let you rent it if you say you'll rent it without any plans.
1200001849.korean: 아무런 계획 없이 대여하겠다고 하면 대여해 줄리 만무하니까요.

1200001851.english: Even without any plans, if you're good at persuading, they'll probably lend it to you, right?
1200001851.korean: 아무런 계획이 없어도 잘 구워삶으면 빌려줄 거 같은데?

1200001853.english: I think we could include a poison pill provision, too? Wouldn't it be enough if I just got their consent?
1200001853.korean: 독소 조항도 포함해도 될 거 같은데? 동의만 받으면 되지 않을까?

1200001855.english: Are you the chief engineer of Fafnir? You seems smarter than Fafnir, so it won't be easy.
1200001855.korean: 파프니르의 기관장인가? 걔는 파프니르보다는 똑똑한 거 같으니 쉽지 않겠지.

1200001856.english: Listening to what you said, it seems like persuading her is more important than Fafnir.
1200001856.korean: 말을 들어보니까 파프니르보다는 걔를 설득하는 게 우선일 거 같은데.

1200001857.english: I'll have to try to convince everyone.

1200001858.english: If you explain it well, it will be fine.

1200001859.english: Coming from someone who's been rejected many times, doesn't that make it persuasive?
1200001859.korean: 거절당한 경험이 많은 제가 하는 말이니 설득력있죠?

1200001860.english: - It was a joke from the iron lady who built, raised, and protected the Orca Resistance from scratch until just before I appeared.
1200001860.korean: - 완전한 제로에서 내가 나타나기 직전까지 오르카 저항군을 만들고 키우고 지킨 여장부의 농담이었다.

1200001861.english: - No one laughed at her self-deprecating jokes.
1200001861.korean: - 그녀의 자조적인 농담을 비웃는 사람은 아무도 없었다.

1200001863.english: Considering factors like stealth, payload capacity, and operational altitude, the scope of the operation will expand.
1200001863.korean: 은밀성, 수송량, 활동 가능 고도 등을 고려하면 작전의 폭이 넓어질 거야.

1200001864.english: No. Rental. Fafnir isn't part of Orca, is she?
1200001864.korean: 아니. 대여. 파프니르는 오르카 소속이 아니잖아.

1200001865.english: It's just a figure of speech to say they exercise command authority. That's extortion.

1200001866.english: It's included in the strong leadership. There's also the saying "a leader of virtue."
1200001866.korean: 선도 강함에 포함돼. 덕장이라는 말도 있잖아.

1200001868.english: What was directed outwards could also be directed inwards.
1200001868.korean: 외부로 향하던 것이 내부로 향할 수도 있어.

1200001869.english: Ultimately, the means are reflected in the results, along with the purpose.
1200001869.korean: 결국엔 수단도 목적과 더불어 결과에 반영돼.

1200001870.english: A reality without problems is just things and phenomena.
1200001870.korean: 이상 없는 현실은 사물과 현상에 불과해.

1200001871.english: If we stray from the path we're aiming for, we'll end up heading toward an unknown goal.
1200001871.korean: 목표로 하는 길에서 벗어나면 우리는 알 수 없는 목표로 향하게 될 거야.

1200001874.english: My sister, the T-9 Gremlin, and the other younger members of the technical department took a look at the Haka overall, right?
1200001874.korean: 언니랑 그렘린이랑 다른 기술부 동생들이랑 같이 하카를 전체적으로 살펴봤거든?

1200001876.english: The injury device runs continuously, so it needs a major overhaul, including stopping it once and completely disassembling it!
1200001876.korean: 부상장치는 쉬지 않고 돌아가서 한 번 정지시키고 완전 분해하는 전면 정비가 필요하거든!

1200001877.english: The same goes for the power source, the hybrid fusion reactor. If my guess is correct, I believe the reason for having eight power sources is to allow for maintenance to be done in rotation, right?
1200001877.korean: 동력원인 복합핵융합로도 마찬가지예요. 제 예상이 맞다면 동력원을 8개를 둔 이유는 돌아가면서 정비를 하기 위한 것이라고 판단되거든요?

1200001878.english: But looking at the maintenance records, the last maintenance was 30 years ago, right? The problem is that I don't keep records because it's a hassle... but if I haven't done any maintenance at all...
1200001878.korean: 그런데 정비기록을 보니까 마지막 정비가 30년 전으로 나오거든요? 이게 귀찮아서 기록을 안 해도 문제인데… 정비를 아예 안 한거면…

1200001879.english: And as for the cloaking device and stealth system, it's hard to say because there are still parts we haven't figured out, but no machine runs perfectly forever, right?
1200001879.korean: 그리고 은폐장과 스텔스 장치는 우리가 아직 파악하지 못한 부분이 있어서 판단하기는 힘들지만 영원히 잘 돌아가는 기계는 없거든?

1200001880.english: No matter how excellent the material properties are, as long as it's part of a mechanical device, there's a high probability that something will go wrong somewhere. Especially with a vacuum airship, even a single hole can be fatal.
1200001880.korean: 재료의 물성이 아무리 훌륭하다고 해도 기계장치의 일부인 이상 어딘가 문제가 생길 확률이 높아요. 특히나 진공 비행선이니 구멍 하나가 치명적이잖아요.

1200001881.english: Above all! A payload of 24,000 tons plus alpha!
1200001881.korean: 무엇보다도! 2만 4천 톤 플러스 알파에 달하는 적재하중!

1200001882.english: It's amazing I've held on this long. We just inspected the reinforcement with non-destructive testing and found many cracks inside the support, so we need to do additional reinforcement work immediately.
1200001882.korean: 지금까지 버틴 게 신기한 지경이에요. 지금 비파괴 검사로 보강부를 확인했는데 지지대 내부에 크랙이 많이 발생한 상황이라 당장 추가 보강 작업을 해야해요.

1200001884.english: Since you're doing it anyway, please also secure the gold so it doesn't spill or roll around.
1200001884.korean: 이왕 하는 거 쌓아둔 금이 쏟아지거나 굴러다니지 않게 고정작업도 부탁드려요.

1200001885.english: Our idiot captain is staying in the ballast room even while we're moving, so it wouldn't be strange if she got crushed at any moment.
1200001885.korean: 우리 멍청이 대장이 하카가 이동 중에도 밸러스트룸에서 지내서 언제 깔려죽어도 이상할 게 없는 지경이니까요.

1200001886.english: Our little brother Sterling, even tho she talks rough, seems to care about Fafnir, doesn't she?
1200001886.korean: 우리 스털링 동생, 말은 험해도 파프니르를 아끼고 있는 거 같거든?

1200001887.english: Well... I don't want to admit it, but she's our boss. And you don't want to see people you know dying, do you?
1200001887.korean: 뭐… 인정하기는 싫지만 우리 대장이니까요. 그리고 아는 사람 죽어나가는 꼴 보기는 싫잖아요.

1200001888.english: This is what it means to be a tsundere.

1200001891.english: But what was this airship built for? I can guess, but...
1200001891.korean: 그런데 이 비행선은 무슨 목적으로 제작됐나요? 짐작은 가는데…

1200001892.english: As you might have guessed, it's the airship Black River developed to launch a surprise attack on Sanan and Densetsu, or perhaps even PECS.
1200001892.korean: 짐작하신 대로 블랙리버가 삼안과 덴세츠 혹은 혹시 모를 PECS를 기습 공격하기 위해서 개발한 비행선이죠.

1200001894.english: During the First Allied War, the Black River also sided with the Saman, didn't they?
1200001894.korean: 1차 연합전쟁 때에는 블랙리버도 삼안과 손을 잡았잖아요.

1200001895.english: There are no eternal allies, and no eternal enemies.
1200001895.korean: 영원한 아군도, 영원한 적군도 없다는 거죠.

1200001896.english: Still, to think of building such a massive vacuum airship. Black River is quite bold, isn't it?
1200001896.korean: 그래도 이렇게 거대한 진공 비행선을 만들 생각을 하다니. 블랙리버도 꽤나 대담하네요?

1200001897.english: The designers asked for an excessive budget.

1200001899.english: I also asked the director of the institute at the time, and she replied like this...
1200001899.korean: 저도 당시 연구소장에게 물어봤는데… 이렇게 대답하더라고요.

1200001900.english: What could be better than doing whatever you want with someone else's money? It's a romance.
1200001900.korean: 남의 돈으로 내가 하고 싶은 것을 마음껏 하는 것만큼 멋진 게 어딨겠어? 로망이지.

1200001903.english: I'm a failure as a working professional, but...

1200001904.english: As an engineer, I can only nod in agreement.

1200001905.english: And because it was wartime. In peaceful times, even extravagant spending that would be impossible otherwise was possible.
1200001905.korean: 그리고 전쟁 중이었으니까요. 평화로운 때라면 불가능한 돈지랄도 가능했죠.

1200001906.english: Logically speaking, could we have created a giant vacuum airship with a maximum payload of 7500 tons, undetectable by radar or sight, and flying at high altitudes during a peaceful era?
1200001906.korean: 상식적으로 생각해서 평화로운 시대에 최대적재중량 7500톤에 레이더와 시야에 감지되지 않고, 고고도를 비행하는 거대 진공 비행선을 만들 수 있었겠어요?

1200001907.english: Wait a minute... I think I heard something wrong, sis?
1200001907.korean: 잠깐… 언니 뭔가 잘못 들은 거 같거든?

1200001908.english: 7500 tons? But you said it carried 24,000 tons?

1200001909.english: Just by simple calculation, it's 3.2 times the maximum load capacity... no, if you include other things, it's even more, right?
1200001909.korean: 단순 계산으로 최대 적재중량의 3.2배… 아니, 다른 것들까지 포함하면 그 이상이거든?

1200001910.english: It wouldn't be strange if it crashed at any moment, you know!?

1200001911.english: That's why I came for maintenance. And while we're at it, let's cut down on the gold. And let the other kids relax too.
1200001911.korean: 그래서 정비 받으러 왔잖아요. 겸사겸사 금도 줄이고. 다른 애들 피로도 풀게 해주고.

1200001912.english: Well... there's so much gold that it doesn't really stand out, but...
1200001912.korean: 뭐… 금이 너무 많아서 티는 별로 안 나지만…

1200001913.english: Should I tell the commander to requisition it...?

1200001914.english: Gremlin. Gremlin. Your true feelings are all showing, aren't they?
1200001914.korean: 그렘린. 그렘린. 속 마음 다 드러나거든?

1200001915.english: But it's a waste! The epitome of lost technology is breaking down like this!
1200001915.korean: 하지만 아깝잖아요! 로스트 테크놀로지의 집약체가 이런 식으로 망가지고 있는 게!

1200001916.english: Rather than see the product of such a miracle be destroyed, I'd rather become the villain...
1200001916.korean: 이런 기적의 산물이 부서질 바에는 악당이 되어버리는 것이…

1200001917.english: T-9 Gremlin. I'm in front of the airship official right now, you know!? I think it's a waste too, but you have to know the time and place, right!?
1200001917.korean: 그렘린. 지금 그 비행선 관계자 앞이거든!? 언니도 아깝다고 생각은 하지만 때와 장소를 구분해야 하거든!?

1200001918.english: Please say that in front of our boss too...
1200001918.korean: 우리 대장 앞에서도 그 말 해주세요…

1200001919.english: I told them that Haka had already reached its limit, but they wouldn't listen.
1200001919.korean: 제가 하카가 이미 한계라고 그렇게 말을 했는데 안 듣더라구요.

1200001920.english: I've also considered switching to Orca with Haka, but...
1200001920.korean: 저도 차라리 오르카에 하카랑 같이 전향해버릴까 생각은 했지만…

1200001923.english: Well... she's our boss, after all.

1200001924.english: In these times, how would our leader survive without Haka?
1200001924.korean: 이런 시대에 하카가 없으면 우리 대장이 어떻게 살겠어요.

1200001926.english: - I found Fafnir to borrow Haka.

1200001927.english: - I didn't need to look for that long.

1200001928.english: Captain! Captain! Buy me the food that Chef Sowan Na made!
1200001928.korean: 대장! 대장! 나 소완 셰프가 만든 음식 사줘!

1200001929.english: If you don't buy it for me, I'll switch to Orca?

1200001930.english: Captain! Captain! Get me some new clothes! The clothes I'm wearing right now are too old! Everyday clothes, work clothes, workwear, going-out clothes, pajamas, and even the outfit you put extra effort into wearing to your annoying friend's wedding!
1200001930.korean: 대장! 대장! 나 새 옷 맞춰줘! 지금 입고 있는 옷은 너무 낡았단 말이야! 일상복, 근무복, 작업복, 외출복, 잠옷, 얄미운 친구 결혼식에 입을 힘 빡 준 옷도!

1200001931.english: The last one is a bit too specific, isn't it?

1200001932.english: It often comes up in movies and things like that.

1200001933.english: Anyway, if you don't buy it, I'll switch to Orca?

1200001934.english: Captain! Captain! Buy me clothes too! And accessories too! And cosmetics too! And also some easy meals to eat when you don't have an appetite!
1200001934.korean: 대장! 대장! 나도 옷 사줘! 그리고 악세서리도! 화장품도! 그리고 입맛 없을 때 먹을 간편식도!

1200001935.english: If you don't buy it for me, I'll switch to Orca?

1200001936.english: Captain! Captain! Animal feed! Animal feed!
1200001936.korean: 대장! 대장! 동물 먹이! 동물 먹이!

1200001937.english: Huh? Are you going to eat it?

1200001938.english: Does that make sense, logically speaking? So you're saying we should also get a pet in Hakka?
1200001938.korean: 상식적으로 생각해서 말이 돼? 우리도 하카에서 애완동물 기르자는 거지.

1200001939.english: Or maybe a cow or chicken would be good, and I could have fresh milk and eggs every day.
1200001939.korean: 아니면 젖소나 닭도 좋고 매일 신선한 우유랑 계란도 먹고.

1200001941.english: If you don't buy it for me, I'll switch to Orca?

1200001942.english: Captain. Can I make a small payment on the Orca Secret Network?
1200001942.korean: 대장. 오르카 시크릿 네트워크에서 조금 결제해도 돼?

1200001944.english: Are you by any chance that...

1200001946.english: If you don't pay, you'll switch to Orca?

1200001948.english: Anyway, just buy me anything! We worked a lot, didn't we?
1200001948.korean: 어쨌든 아무거나 사줘! 우리 일 많이 했잖아!

1200001949.english: If you don't buy it for me, I'll switch to Orca?

1200001950.english: Don't you know the saying, "You have to save to live well!?"
1200001950.korean: 너희들 아껴야 잘 산다는 말 몰라!?

1200001951.english: Don't you know the saying, "If you save it, it will turn into waste"?

1200001952.english: Gold doesn't turn into poop, you know? Gold is always gold, isn't it?
1200001952.korean: 금은 똥 안 되거든? 금은 언제나 금이거든?

1200001953.english: Don't poop in the middle of the road...

1200001954.english: - Fafnir's subordinates were surrounding him, demanding various things.
1200001954.korean: - 파프니르의 부하들은 파프니르를 둘러싼 채로 이것저것 사달라고 요구하고 있었다.

1200001955.english: - Fafnir protested that it wouldn't work, but...

1200001957.english: - In the end, Orca's gold reserves increased.

1200001958.english: - Fafnir's subordinates eagerly went to buy what they wanted.
1200001958.korean: - 파프니르의 부하들은 신이 나서 자기들이 사고 싶은 것을 사러 갔다.

1200001959.english: - Fafnir was watching the backs of those subordinates.
1200001959.korean: - 파프니르는 그런 부하들의 뒷모습을 보고 있었다.

1200001961.english: What? What? Are you trying to get more gold from me again?
1200001961.korean: 뭐? 뭐? 너도 또 나한테서 금 뜯어가려고?

1200001962.english: So, you're going to be mine?

1200001965.english: - Fafnir subtly moved a few steps away from me.
1200001965.korean: - 파프니르는 슬쩍 나에게서 몇 발자국 멀어졌다.

1200001966.english: Sterling said not to follow anyone blindly, even if they offer you gold.
1200001966.korean: 스털링이 누가 금 준다고 해도 함부로 따라가지 말라고 그랬어.

1200001967.english: - Am I being treated like a child...?

1200001968.english: Of course, after following them, I turned the tables, smashed the villain's hideout, and took the treasure.
1200001968.korean: 물론 따라간 후에 반대로 악당의 아지트를 박살내고 보물을 가져왔지.

1200001970.english: - There's no reason to make it complicated.

1200001976.english: Then I'll come to your room with Sterling.
1200001976.korean: 그러면 스털링이랑 같이 네 방에 찾아 갈게.

1200001980.english: In fact, I might even give you gold.
1200001980.korean: 오히려 너에게 금을 줄지도 모르는 상황이야.

1200001982.english: I'll just come right out and say it.

1200001984.english: It's a bit difficult to talk here... Let's go to my room.
1200001984.korean: 여기서는 말하기 조금 그렇고… 내 방으로 가자.

1200001985.english: Yeah, I think Sterling should be there too.
1200001985.korean: 응, 스털링도 있어야 할 거 같아.

1200001986.english: - While I was working in my room, Fafnir came in with Sterling.
1200001986.korean: - 내 방에서 업무를 진행하고 있을 때, 파프니르가 스털링과 함께 들어왔다.
